zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Emma d'Aubigny於1363年出生在英國越可爾瑟賽時，她的父親Giles Daubeney29歲，母親Lady Alainore de Willington26歲。她於1380年與Sir William Darrell在英國英格蘭肯特蕾托 哈特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1389年在她的家鄉享年26歲。

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Emma d'Aubigny was born in 1363, in Sessay, Yorkshire, England, her father, Giles Daubeney, was 29 and her mother, Lady Alainore de Willington, was 26. She married Sir William Darrell in 1380, in Little Chart, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1389, in her hometown, at the age of 26.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Emma d'Aubigny est née en 1363, à Sessay, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Giles Daubeney, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Lady Alainore de Willington, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Darrell en 1380, à Little Chart, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1389, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 26 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Emma d'Aubignyが1363年にイギリスヨークシュアイアセッサイで生まれた時，父Giles Daubeneyは29歳，母Lady Alainore de Willingtonは26歳であった。1380年にイギリスイギリスケントリットル チャートでSir William Darrellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1389年に故郷で26歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Emma d'Aubigny(이)가 1363년 영국 요르크실르 세지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Giles Daubeney(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Alainore de Willington(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 리틀 처트에서 Sir William Darrell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1389년 그녀의 고향에서 26세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Emma d'Aubigny nasceu em 1363, em Sessay, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Giles Daubeney, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alainore de Willington, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Darrell em 1380, em Little Chart, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1389, em sua cidade natal, com 26 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Emma d'Aubigny родилась в 1363 г. в местности сессеи, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Giles Daubeney было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alainore de Willington, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Darrell в 1380 г. в местности литл чарт, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1389 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 26 лет.
